use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use md2pdf because Convert Markdown files to PDF with styles (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use md2pdf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `md2pdf [options] [args]` as documented upstream for md2pdf.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair md2pdf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `md2pdf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
